reasoning: The iron key sprite is ~60-70% neutral gray/silver — cold and desaturated, directly contrary to the BRIGHT/WARM mandate that warm mid-values dominate. Orange/rust accents (~15%) and teal shaft highlight (~10%) are palette-compatible and prevent a score of 1-2, but they are too minor to shift the overall impression away from 'conventional dungeon-gray object.' Presentation panels 1-3 use near-black/dark-charcoal backgrounds rather than the required colored darks (deep teal/plum/warm brown). The parchment panel 4 background is correctly warm. Overall mood reads grim/cold rather than BRIGHT harmonious Echoes-tuned warm.
